display.purpose: Film titles and page headings only.

headline.purpose: Section titles, card headings, filter group labels.

body.purpose: Descriptions, cinema addresses, long-form content. Capped at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, tags, metadata labels, badge text. Uppercase with wide tracking.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Header bars and resting elevated surfaces.

shadows.name: ambient-high
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, search suggestion panels, and modal-like overlays.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for color, border, and background transitions. 150ms.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The loudest action on a screen. Used sparingly.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: #ea580c; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #c2410c; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(234 88 12 / 0.18); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Icon-only controls and inline actions that should recede.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost" aria-label="Close"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M18 6 6 18"/><path d="m6 6 12 12"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: transparent; color: #475569; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f1f5f9; color: #0f172a; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(234 88 12 / 0.18); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: The main search field with icon and clear affordance.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; } .ds-input-icon { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 0.75rem; transform: translateY(-50%); color: #64748b; pointer-events: none; } .ds-input { width: 100%; border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; background: #ffffff; color: #0f172a; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem 0.5rem 2.5rem; line-height: 1.5; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #ea580c; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(234 88 12 / 0.18); }

components.name: Movie Card
components.description: Poster + title + variants + showtime count. Hover lifts subtly.
components.html:
The Substance

OV
12 showtimes
components.css: .ds-card { display: block; background: #ffffff; border: 2px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.75rem; overflow: hidden; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease, transform 200ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgb(234 88 12 / 0.35); box-shadow: 0 12px 28px -14px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.28); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-poster { aspect-ratio: 2/3; width: 100%; background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-card-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; flex: 1; padding: 1rem; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.3; color: #0f172a; margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0; } .ds-card-badges { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.25rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-badge-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid rgb(234 88 12 / 0.4); background: #ffedd5; color: #9a3412; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-meta { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #475569; margin-top: auto; padding-top: 0.5rem; }

components.name: Accent Badge
components.description: Film variant tags: OV, OmU, etc.
components.css: .ds-badge-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid rgb(234 88 12 / 0.4); background: #ffedd5; color: #9a3412; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Header Bar
components.description: Top navigation with logo, search, and theme toggle.
components.html: OV Berlin
components.css: .ds-header { width: 100%; background: #ffffff; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(15 23 42 / 0.06); } .ds-header-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 4rem; max-width: 80rem; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 1rem; } .ds-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-logo-text { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #0f172a; }

narrative.overview: A cinema programme stripped to only what you need. No decorative flourishes, no marketing noise — just film titles, showtimes, and cinema names arranged with the clarity of a well-designed transit board. The warmth comes from careful typography (DM Serif Display lending film titles their proper weight) and a single functional accent color that marks what matters. Every pixel serves information density or readability. Nothing else.
keyCharacteristics: Flat surfaces by default; tonal layering conveys depth
Single warm accent used sparingly as a signal, not decoration
Serif display for film titles only; everything else is clean sans-serif
Generous whitespace around information, tight packing within information groups
Light and dark modes treated as equals — neither is primary

rules.name: The Signal Rarity Rule
rules.body: The OV Signal Orange occupies ≤10% of any given screen. Its power comes from restraint. If more than 10% of a view is orange, the hierarchy has failed.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: No pure #000 or #ffffff in the system (surface white excepted for functional contrast). Every neutral carries a cool slate tint so the palette feels intentional, not default.

rules.name: The One Serif Rule
rules.body: DM Serif Display appears only on film titles and page headings. Every other text element — buttons, labels, badges, body copy — uses DM Sans. The serif is a privilege, not a default.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus) or when a panel must visually detach from its parent surface.

dos: Do use DM Serif Display exclusively for film titles and page headings. Let the serif carry the cultural weight.
Do keep the OV Signal Orange to ≤10% of any screen. One primary button, a few variant badges, a selected state — that's the budget.
Do use labels over icons wherever space allows. Plain English reduces cognitive load for non-native speakers.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion. All transitions should be disableable.
Do ensure all state changes (hover, focus, active, selected) are conveyed through more than color alone — pattern, text, or icon changes.
Do use the cinema badge color system consistently. Each cinema keeps its assigned hue across every view.
donts: Don't use hero banners, upsell modules, or sales-first hierarchy. This is a tool, not a commercial cinema chain site.
Don't add ratings, reviews, social proof, or community features. OV Berlin is not a taste network.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative blurs. Every surface should be opaque and readable.
Don't let the accent color dominate. If a screen feels 'orange,' the signal has become noise.
Don't use pure #000 or #ffffff for text or backgrounds. The slate tint is intentional — it prevents the sterile default-computer look.
Don't wrap everything in cards. Most information doesn't need a container; use cards only when the boundary genuinely helps scanning.
